'''âp-s-b''' ('''kapasab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lure|lure]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lure|lure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-s-b
|-
! Lemma
| kapasab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipasab|thipasab]] || [[word:jipasab|jipasab]] || [[word:shipasab|shipasab]] || [[word:kipasab|kipasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupasab|thuthupasab]] || [[word:jujupasab|jujupasab]] || [[word:shushupasab|shushupasab]] || [[word:kukupasab|kukupasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupasab|thupasab]] || [[word:jupasab|jupasab]] || [[word:shupasab|shupasab]] || [[word:kupasab|kupasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupasab|thupasab]] || [[word:jupasab|jupasab]] || [[word:shupasab|shupasab]] || [[word:kupasab|kupasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepasab|thepasab]] || [[word:jepasab|jepasab]] || [[word:shepasab|shepasab]] || [[word:kepasab|kepasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopasab|thothopasab]] || [[word:jojopasab|jojopasab]] || [[word:shoshopasab|shoshopasab]] || [[word:kokopasab|kokopasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopasab|thopasab]] || [[word:jopasab|jopasab]] || [[word:shopasab|shopasab]] || [[word:kopasab|kopasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopasab|thopasab]] || [[word:jopasab|jopasab]] || [[word:shopasab|shopasab]] || [[word:kopasab|kopasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpasab|thĂŠpasab]] || [[word:jĂŠpasab|jĂŠpasab]] || [[word:shĂŠpasab|shĂŠpasab]] || [[word:kĂŠpasab|kĂŠpasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapasab|thathapasab]] || [[word:jajapasab|jajapasab]] || [[word:shashapasab|shashapasab]] || [[word:kakapasab|kakapasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapasab|thapasab]] || [[word:japasab|japasab]] || [[word:shapasab|shapasab]] || [[word:kapasab|kapasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapasab|thapasab]] || [[word:japasab|japasab]] || [[word:shapasab|shapasab]] || [[word:kapasab|kapasab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapasab|shapasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapasab|goshapasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapasab|gokishapasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapasabnĂŒ|shapasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapasabnknĂŒ|goshapasabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasabnĂŒ|gokishapasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapasabshĂ«|shapasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapasabnkshĂ«|goshapasabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapasabshĂ«|gokishapasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasabro|shapasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasabnkro|goshapasabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasabro|gokishapasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasabmu|shapasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasabnkmu|goshapasabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasabmu|gokishapasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapasabsher|shapasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapasabnksher|goshapasabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapasabsher|gokishapasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapasabng|shapasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapasabnkng|goshapasabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapasabng|gokishapasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapasabya|shapasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapasabnkya|goshapasabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapasabya|gokishapasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapasabyam|shapasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapasabnkyam|goshapasabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapasabyam|gokishapasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasabnĂŒshĂ«|shapasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapasabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasabnĂŒro|shapasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasabnknĂŒro|goshapasabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasabnĂŒro|gokishapasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasabnĂŒmu|shapasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasabnknĂŒmu|goshapasabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasabnĂŒmu|gokishapasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasabshĂ«nĂŒ|shapasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasabshĂ«ro|shapasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasabnkshĂ«ro|goshapasabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasabshĂ«ro|gokishapasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasabshĂ«mu|shapasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasabnkshĂ«mu|goshapasabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasabshĂ«mu|gokishapasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasabronĂŒ|shapasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasabnkronĂŒ|goshapasabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasabronĂŒ|gokishapasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasabroshĂ«|shapasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasabnkroshĂ«|goshapasabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasabroshĂ«|gokishapasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapasabromu|shapasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapasabnkromu|goshapasabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapasabromu|gokishapasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapasabmunĂŒ|shapasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapasabnkmunĂŒ|goshapasabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapasabmunĂŒ|gokishapasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapasabmushĂ«|shapasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapasabnkmushĂ«|goshapasabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapasabmushĂ«|gokishapasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapasabmuro|shapasabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapasabnkmuro|goshapasabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapasabmuro|gokishapasabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
